subcodes.title: Words to George Winterburn et al, spoken on 1904-02-06
subcodes.first_line: Whatever there is in the world of contingency is a symbol of the spiritual world; whatever there is on the earth is a symbol of heavenly things.
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @material world a reflection of the spiritual, @empty learning; false spirituality, @suffering; rejection of Christ
